zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Watts於1418年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可沃斯亞德時，他的父親Simon Wathes deWath24歲，母親Margaret Stotesburg20歲。他和Isabel Strafford至少有1個兒子。他去世於1467年在英國英格蘭越可爾桑達爾 馬尼亞享年49歲。

nameMeanings.name: Watts
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Watt , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Watt
meanings: Scottish and English: from the common Middle English personal name, Wat(t), a short form of Walter .
West African (Senegal and Mauritania): Tukulor name of unexplained etymology.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 屈, possibly based on its Cantonese pronunciation, see   Qu   3.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Watts was born in 1418, in Worstead, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Simon Wathes deWath, was 24 and his mother, Margaret Stotesburg, was 20. He had at least 1 son with Isabel Strafford. He died in 1467, in Sandal Magna, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49.

fr.Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England: Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Watts est né en 1418, à Worstead, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Simon Wathes deWath, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret Stotesburg, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Isabel Strafford. Il est décédé en 1467, à Sandal Magna, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans.

ko.Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 세인트 마거릿
ko.lifeSummary: Richard Watts(이)가 1418년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 워스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon Wathes deWath(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Stotesburg(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Isabel Strafford(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1467년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 샌다 매그나에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England: ормесби сеинт маргарет, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Watts родился в 1418 г. в местности ворстид, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Simon Wathes deWath было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Stotesburg, 20. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Isabel Strafford. Он умер в 1467 г. в местности сэндаль магна, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет.
